diagrams.title: Types of Constants in C
diagrams.description: A hierarchical diagram showing all categories of constants in C programming
diagrams.purpose: Understanding constant classification and hierarchy in C

diagrams.title: C Keywords Categories
diagrams.description: Visual grouping of 32 ANSI C keywords by their functionality
elements: Data Types: int, float, double, char, void, long, short, signed, unsigned
Control Flow: if, else, switch, case, default, for, while, do, break, continue, goto, return
Storage Classes: auto, register, static, extern, const, volatile, typedef
diagrams.purpose: Memorizing and categorizing C keywords for quick reference

diagrams.title: Const Pointer Declaration Rules
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing how to read and interpret const with pointers in C
elements: Look at right side of * first
If const is after * (int *const): pointer is constant
If const is before * (const int *): data pointed is constant
If const on both sides: both are constant
